title: post admin municipality with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/admin/municipality endpoint with all required fields provided to ensure successful creation or update of municipality settings, expecting a 200 response with success true.

title: post admin municipality with missing required field
description: Test the POST /api/admin/municipality endpoint with a missing required field such as planTier to verify that the server returns a 500 error with success false and an appropriate error message.

title: get analytics executive report success
description: Test the GET /api/analytics/executive-report endpoint to fetch aggregated dashboard statistics successfully, expecting a 200 response with success true and data containing user metrics, completions, and heatmap telemetry.

title: get analytics executive report with invalid query or aggregation failure
description: Test the GET /api/analytics/executive-report endpoint with invalid query parameters or simulate data aggregation failure to verify that the server returns a 400 error with success false and an error message.

title: get analytics executive report server error
description: Test the GET /api/analytics/executive-report endpoint when a server or data store error occurs to ensure the server returns a 500 error with success false and an error message.

title: post ai generate quiz with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/ai/generate-quiz endpoint with valid POI text and optionsCount 3 to verify successful generation of a 3-option quiz, expecting a 200 response with success true and quiz details.

title: post ai generate quiz with malformed body
description: Test the POST /api/ai/generate-quiz endpoint with malformed or incomplete request body to verify that the server returns a 400 error with success false and an appropriate error message.

title: post ai generate route with valid pdf
description: Test the POST /api/ai/generate-route endpoint with a valid PDF file and routeId to verify successful generation of a full route breakdown, expecting a 200 response with success true and route breakdown details.

title: post ai generate route with large pdf timeout
description: Test the POST /api/ai/generate-route endpoint with a very large PDF file that exceeds processing time limits to verify that the server returns a 500 or 504 error indicating timeout or processing failure.

title: post ai generate route quiz with missing routesummary
description: Test the POST /api/ai/generate-route-quiz endpoint with missing routeSummary in the request body to verify that the server returns a 400 error with success false and an appropriate error message.
